title: Restaurant Deals, Colorful Concerts & Gnome Hunting!
description: From surprisingly good restaurant deals to a few easy, local events, here’s what caught our eye in South OC this week.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Dive Bars & Big Moons
description: Tree lightings, holiday lights, and a dive-bar detour to Mugs Away, where we learned about its infamous Mooning of the Amtrak, one of the wildest traditions in Orange County!
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Walk Off the Pie + Go See Lights
description: This weekend brings lots of holiday lights and festivities, carolers, a tiki party at Royal Hawaiian, a fix-it cafe and 17 easy post-Thanksgiving strolls.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Lights, Wine & Hidden Caves
description: Kick off the holidays with South OC’s brightest tree lightings, glowing night markets, and a hike to Aliso Viejo’s secret bandit cave.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Wine Fests & Line Dancing
description: Line dancing in San Juan, wine fests in Costa Mesa, yoga in Aliso Viejo, candle-making in Mission Viejo, and art in nature at Bommer Canyon, your weekend plans, done.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: 👻 Halloween for Grown-Ups
description: Halloween isn’t just for kids. There’s wine by the harbor, a tiki party in San Clemente, rooftop disco dancing in Irvine, a spooky escape room in Lake Forest, and a block party in RSM. Keep scrolling for Día de los Muertos festivals all over OC and even a hike to one of OC’s most haunting spots.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: 👻 Haunted by Your Neighbors!
description: Haunted houses aren’t just for kids! Explore spooky home haunts, live music, fall fests, and creative Halloween fun for grown-ups across South Orange County. Check out the house in the photo at 23852 Lagarto, Mission Viejo.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: 👻 Haunted Trails, Fall-O-Ween & Ghost Walks Await
description: If you’re ready to trade beach days for ghost tours and glowing pumpkins, South OC’s serving spooky season in full this year.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: $5 Patio Cookout!
description: 🔥 Pulled pork, teriyaki chicken, burgers; all grilled fresh on the patio with a side included. Pub Thirty Two serves up the best deal in town every Tuesday!Plus... coffee flights, line dancing in the barn, and music under the stars.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Balboa Fun Zone Is Changing
description: Balboa Fun Zone’s $115M makeover, a free yoga hike Dana Point’s Maritime Festival, vintage markets, live jazz in Laguna and more South OC weekend picks.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: 🍍 Tiki Bars & Cheap Tacos
description: We tiki-hopped across Orange County to rank every bar — from Anaheim’s shipwrecked Strong Water to Laguna’s Royal Hawaiian. Plus, where to score 69¢ tacos, the Sea Country Festival in Laguna Niguel, and a glowing bioluminescence cruise in Dana Point.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Go Full Tiki with a Flaming Lapu Lapu!
description: Laguna Beach has its tiki magic back. Step inside the Royal Hawaiian and you’re surrounded by walls of bamboo and thatch, carved totems in every corner, glowing starfish lamps overhead, and cocktails are the perfect balance of strong and smooth.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: This Famous Chef Built the Best Bakery in Orange County
description: How one local baker turned social media fame into the best pastry shop in Orange County. Plus, lanterns floating at sunset, beers poured by the harbor and walking in nature.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: ChatGPT Roasts South OC
description: From Shakespeare in the park to a hidden spring in Silverado, this weekend’s guide has your South OC plans covered. Plus: the surprisingly hilarious trend of letting ChatGPT roast your hometown.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: OC's Coolest Brewery?
description: Sip bold beer beneath a vintage Model T, then line dance at Dana Point Harbor, plant a salad bowl garden, stroll a pup-packed trail, and catch Symphony under the stars.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Poe Me A Drink...
description: Drink a raven-blue cocktail at the Edgar Allan Poe Speakeasy (yes, in a cemetery chapel), then breathe deep on a mindfulness hike, wander Books & Blooms, sing along to “Rocket Man” lakeside, and choose Dad’s day: bourbon-smoked BBQ, a dad-joke trail, or a soul-soothing sound bath.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Try Something New!
description: Try something new this weekend - tap into your inner dancer, chef, sailor, or artist. Then stroll an art festival under the oaks, or dive into a hidden swim cove in Laguna. Plus: moonlit hikes, live music, and pints at a reimagined Irish pub.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Speakeasy Does It
description: Sip wine under canyon oaks, catch classical strings in the park and wrap the night with moody cocktails behind a speakeasy hidden door. AND... South OC's most popular donut shops!
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Vintage Finds & Starry Nights
description: Bargain hunting on San Clemente’s Thrift Row, jazz under the stars in Laguna, and line dancing in Mission Viejo lead the weekend lineup. Plus: a chili cook-off, Memorial Day festivities, and a guided hike through the “Grand Canyon of OC.”
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Coffee Flights Have Landed
description: We finally checked out River Street in San Juan Capistrano - it was all 'Western charm' and a smoky mezcal cocktail we’re still thinking about. We also sipped our way through a four-drink coffee flight in Lake Forest and rounded up weekend plans that include secret gardens, stargazing, and a Balboa art walk. Plus: Housewives of OC drama, live music, and local events worth changing out of sweats for.
author: The Scene: South OC

title: Best Choc Chip Cookies in South OC
description: This week in The Scene: we ranked South OC’s best chocolate chip cookies (yes, we tried them all), scoped out Mother’s Day plans from harbor cruises to lakeside picnics, and found a secret swing with a view. Plus: city drama, live music, and local events worth changing out of sweats for.
author: The Scene: South OC
